subject: [PATCH v2 00/14] fuse: add io-uring buffer rings and zero-copy

reviews.author: Joanne Koong
reviews.summary: Moved fuse_uring_abort() out of the inline header definition and into dev_uring.c to make subsequent commits cleaner.

reviews.author: Joanne Koong
reviews.summary: Rearranged io-uring iovec and ent allocation logic to make the subsequent commit that adds buffer rings easier to review.

2026-04-02.patch_summary: This patch series adds buffer ring and zero-copy capabilities to the FUSE file system over io-uring, reducing memory usage and enabling pinned buffers for future optimizations.
